signals.reconciliation_hint: SPLIT: brain confidence only 55% (HOLD); legacy says LONG. The brains aren't sure here — lean on the data. Your call.

brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 31, mirroring the emotional capitulation seen during the August 2024 bottom formation. Despite the pervasive anxiety, silent smart money is absorbing the sell-off, evidenced by surging stablecoin growth that historically precedes relief rallies in these high-similarity setups. The market is coiling in a sideways regime, waiting for the momentum to shift from exhausted sellers to sidelined buyers.
brain_consensus.headline: Stablecoin Dry Powder Meets Extreme Fear

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31 (Fear/Greed) placing us in Anxiety band (39-46 is Complacency, 32-38 is Denial, 24-31 is Panic — 31 is at the Panic/Anxiety boundary but Fear/Greed of 31 maps to ~39-46 score-adjusted; using the explicit score band rule: 31 falls in Panic 24-31, but Fear/Greed raw is 31/100 which maps to ~39 on the 0-100 ladder, putting us in Anxiety 39-46. The 78.9% match to bottom_2024_aug is misleading — that was Disbelief (55-62), we're nowhere near that score band. The massive ETF flow divergence (+45), VIX spike (+28), and MVRV collapse (-16) vs that bottom show this is NOT the same structure. My 0-for-18 record screams: stop forcing direction in coils. The 0% base rate of ±2+ point moves in 37 windows is the breaker I see — there is no breaker. Stablecoin growth flat at 50, funding neutral-negative, BTC flat 30d, DXY weak but not collapsing, gold at 80 — this is capital hiding in safety, not rotating to risk. BTC dominance fade at +25 suggests alt bleeding, not broad crypto bid. Hold.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC funding turns sustainably positive (>0.01%) with Fear/Greed breaking above 38 and stablecoin growth accelerating above 55
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 22 with BTC breaking below $62K and MVRV z-score dropping below 15, forcing a move to Panic leg down

narrative.headline: Stablecoin Dry Powder Meets Extreme Fear

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests accumulation during peak fear, but the statistically frozen score confirms a coiled market where a breakout is imminent yet direction remains unconfirmed.

next_move.reasoning: With zero ±2+ point moves in 37 windows and no confirmed breaker visible, HOLD is the statistically honest call — the coil resolves when funding turns sustainably positive or VIX spikes force a leg down.
